title: Made in Abyss Music Resource Pack
description: Made in Abyss audio resource pack using 1.20 Trails & Tales sound file names and covering all current tracks up to 1.21.6 Chase the Skies.
body: For best results, this pack is intended to be used on the Mine in Abyss server. All vanilla tracks are replaced with Kevin Penkin's music from the anime series: Made in Abyss. The goal of this pack is simply to update similar existing packs to Minecraft's 1.20 track naming and add tracks from subsequent game versions.
